layers.label: Ocean Current Velocity
layers.description: Eastward and northward sea water velocity from global 6-hourly physics analysis and forecast.

layers.label: Surface Wind
layers.description: Global hourly sea surface wind from scatterometer and model

layers.label: Phytoplankton (Chlorophyll-a)
layers.description: Daily chlorophyll-a concentration from global biogeochemistry analysis and forecast.

layers.label: Wave Stokes Drift
layers.description: Net horizontal wave-driven transport (Stokes drift) from global 3-hourly wave analysis — visualises wave energy propagation direction.

layers.label: Dissolved Inorganic Carbon
layers.description: Daily dissolved inorganic carbon concentration from global biogeochemistry analysis and forecast.

layers.label: Ocean pH
layers.description: Daily sea water pH reported on the total scale from global biogeochemistry analysis and forecast.

layers.label: Primary Production
layers.description: Daily net primary production of biomass expressed as carbon per unit volume.

layers.label: Dissolved Oxygen
layers.description: Daily dissolved molecular oxygen concentration from global biogeochemistry analysis and forecast.

layers.label: Nitrate
layers.description: Daily nitrate concentration from global biogeochemistry analysis and forecast.

layers.label: Phosphate
layers.description: Daily phosphate concentration from global biogeochemistry analysis and forecast.

layers.label: Surface CO2
layers.description: Daily surface partial pressure of carbon dioxide in sea water.

layers.label: Sea Ice Thickness
layers.description: Daily sea ice thickness from global physics analysis and forecast.

layers.label: Sea Water Temperature
layers.description: Daily sea water potential temperature from global physics analysis and forecast.

layers.label: Sea Water Salinity
layers.description: Daily sea water salinity from global physics analysis and forecast.

layers.label: Upward Sea Water Velocity
layers.description: Daily upward sea water velocity from global physics analysis and forecast.

layers.label: Mixed Layer Depth
layers.description: Daily ocean mixed layer thickness defined by sigma theta.

layers.label: Primary Swell Direction
layers.description: Primary swell wave direction reported as the direction waves come from.

layers.label: Primary Swell Period
layers.description: Mean period of the primary swell wave from spectral moments.

layers.label: Primary Swell Height
layers.description: Significant height of the primary swell wave.

layers.label: Primary Swell Propagation
layers.description: Derived primary swell propagation using significant height as magnitude and from-direction converted to travel direction.

layers.label: Sea Ice Drift
layers.description: Daily eastward and northward velocity of sea ice, tracing polar ice floe motion.
